spec.name: tele observability
spec.description: Mirrors apps/web Metrics.tsx panels using the persisted tele_* measurements (tele_counter, tele_gauge, tele_histogram, tele_error). Default range last 24h, refresh 30s.

charts.name: Telegram message rate (in vs out proxy)
charts.note: Inbound = router.message_received. Outbound proxy = sender.message.ok (no dedicated router.outbound_sent counter exists).

queries.query:
from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_counter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "router.message_received" or r.name == "sender.message.ok")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true, unit: 1m)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "msgs_per_min")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_counter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "bot.message_received" or r.name == "bot.callback_received" or r.name == "bot.choice_claimed.ok")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true, unit: 1m)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "events_per_min")

charts.name: AI / Gemini call rate (ok / error / retry)

queries.query:
from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_counter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "gemini.call.ok" or r.name == "gemini.call.error" or r.name == "gemini.call.retry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true, unit: 1m)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "calls_per_min")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_histogram")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "gemini.latency_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "p95" or r._field == "p99")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "latency_ms")

charts.name: AI spend cumulative (USD)
charts.note: Plots the running gemini.cost_micro_usd counter divided by 1e6. Resets to 0 at server boot; nonNegative derivative is NOT used here intentionally (we want the cumulative line).

queries.query:
from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_counter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "gemini.cost_micro_usd")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 1000000.0 }))
  |> yield(name: "cost_usd")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_counter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "gemini.cost_micro_usd")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true, unit: 1h)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 1000000.0 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "usd_per_hour")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_counter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "gemini.tokens.prompt" or r.name == "gemini.tokens.completion")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true, unit: 1m)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "tokens_per_min")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_counter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name =~ /^tool\.invoked\..+\.ok$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 15)
  |> keep(columns: ["name", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: { name: "tool", _value: "invocations" })

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_error")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "count")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true, unit: 5m)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> top(n: 10, columns: ["_value"])
  |> yield(name: "errors_per_5m")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_counter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name =~ /^telegram\.(keepalive|watchdog)\..+$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true, unit: 1m)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "telegram_health_per_min")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_counter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "influx.write.ok" or r.name == "influx.write.err")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true, unit: 1m)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "writes_per_min")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_gauge")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "ws.subscribers")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "subscribers")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele_counter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "responder.reply_sent" or r.name == "responder.empty_reply_skipped" or r.name == "responder.error")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true, unit: 1m)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "responder_per_min")
